subject: Welcome to your Digital Dealer update!
preheader: February edition: Upcoming releases and progress highlights.

blocks.title: Welcome to your Digital Dealer update!
blocks.body: # Scania Weekly Intelligence. This edition summarizes upcoming product improvements and near-term release plans.
Below you can review upcoming releases that focus on operational flow, transparency, and faster daily actions for dealer teams.

blocks.title: Upcoming releases
blocks.disclaimer:
The images presented in this newsletter are from preliminary designs.
Minor design and other changes can be expected...

items.title: Jobs for PDI activities
items.kicker: Automate preparation flow for faster handover.
items.body: Fleet Innovation initiatives now include clearer job lifecycle signals for planning and follow-up.

media.alt: Release preview for Jobs for PDI activities

items.title: Release timeline visibility
items.kicker: Give teams faster status awareness at a glance.
items.body: A compact timeline summary highlights what is planned, in validation, and ready for rollout.

items.title: Workshop slot coordination
items.kicker: Reduce booking friction during peak demand periods.
items.body: Slot coordination adds quicker conflict detection and clearer prioritization when demand changes.

media.alt: Release preview for workshop slot coordination

items.title: Parts request tracking
items.kicker: Improve confidence with clearer delivery checkpoints.
items.body: Parts request tracking now surfaces progress states and delays earlier so teams can react faster.

media.alt: Release preview for parts request tracking

items.title: Retail handover checklist
items.body: The handover checklist supports consistent customer-ready delivery with clearer completion indicators.

media.alt: Release preview for retail handover checklist

items.title: Service notification center
items.kicker: Centralize critical updates for daily execution.
items.body: A unified notification center helps teams act on high-priority service events without missing context.

media.alt: Release preview for service notification center

blocks.body: Add or remove blocks without changing renderer code paths; QA checks run before delivery artifacts are produced.
